response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile tailored for first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, could be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a trusted real estate agency that provides expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Our team specializes in helping buyers and sellers navigate the real estate market, offering comprehensive support in all aspects of property transactions and financing. We aim to build long-term relationships with our clients, ensuring a reliable and personalized experience from the moment you begin your home search. Services include property consultations, market analysis, and financing solutions, with a focus on supporting first-time home buyers and experienced home owners in Orlando and surrounding areas.
